2026-03-11T10:28:12.6601137Z **New failure (actionable):**
2026-03-11T10:28:14.7892671Z - **`@azure/storage-blob`** — `ContentChecksumValidation with client config - CRC64 > uploadStream should update progress event` fails with "The Structured Message was not valid." This is a **new** failure linked to the recently merged CRC64 structured-message checksum feature (PR #37208). Two potential bugs found in `sdk/storage/storage-common/src/StructuredMessageEncoding.ts`:
2026-03-11T10:28:15.8881219Z   1. `fillInt64()` loop runs `< 6` iterations instead of `< 8` (copies only 6 of 8 bytes)
2026-03-11T10:28:15.8897744Z   2. `handlingMessageHeader()` writes `this.messageLength` (total framed length) where the comment says "content length" — likely should be `this.contentLength`
